### REQUEST ###

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int, int]\r\n# (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        payload = bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\"\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            payload,\r\n            tcp.seq,\r\n            tcp.flags,\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags).\"\"\"\r\n    reader, fh = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            _, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n    finally:\r\n        fh.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "486fd1fdbb30e4e15461f97e4e5e1d3ef2c7303b62ef272352e72b93cca9ed62",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Base protocol handler interface for plugin-style decoders.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r\nfrom typing import TYPE_CHECKING\r\n\r\nif TYPE_CHECKING:\r\n    from netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef ts_at_offset(offset: int, ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp for byte at offset; ts_map is sorted (offset, ts).\"\"\"\r\n    if not ts_map:\r\n        return None\r\n    best_ts = None\r\n    for o, t in ts_map:\r\n        if o <= offset:\r\n            best_ts = t\r\n    return best_ts\r\n\r\n\r\nclass ProtocolHandler(ABC):\r\n    \"\"\"Base for application-layer protocol decoders.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"Protocol name (e.g. 'http1', 'http2', 'grpc').\"\"\"\r\n        ...\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        \"\"\"Return True if this protocol appears to be in use for this flow.\"\"\"\r\n        ...\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[\"Transaction\"]:\r\n        \"\"\"Extract transactions from reassembled streams. Return empty list on failure.\"\"\"\r\n        ...\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "4cfcce55333ba5741182a961a962173efaa3233e91f7c256b72064a2dd23ed97",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4845634861506629183}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int, int]\r\n# (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        payload = bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\"\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            payload,\r\n            tcp.seq,\r\n            tcp.flags,\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes, int, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags).\"\"\"\r\n    reader, fh = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            _, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags)\r\n    finally:\r\n        fh.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "486fd1fdbb30e4e15461f97e4e5e1d3ef2c7303b62ef272352e72b93cca9ed62", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Base protocol handler interface for plugin-style decoders.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r\nfrom typing import TYPE_CHECKING\r\n\r\nif TYPE_CHECKING:\r\n    from netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef ts_at_offset(offset: int, ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]]) -> float | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Return timestamp for byte at offset; ts_map is sorted (offset, ts).\"\"\"\r\n    if not ts_map:\r\n        return None\r\n    best_ts = None\r\n    for o, t in ts_map:\r\n        if o <= offset:\r\n            best_ts = t\r\n    return best_ts\r\n\r\n\r\nclass ProtocolHandler(ABC):\r\n    \"\"\"Base for application-layer protocol decoders.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        \"\"\"Protocol name (e.g. 'http1', 'http2', 'grpc').\"\"\"\r\n        ...\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        \"\"\"Return True if this protocol appears to be in use for this flow.\"\"\"\r\n        ...\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[\"Transaction\"]:\r\n        \"\"\"Extract transactions from reassembled streams. Return empty list on failure.\"\"\"\r\n        ...\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "4cfcce55333ba5741182a961a962173efaa3233e91f7c256b72064a2dd23ed97", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
